intended_use: Second Opinion® CS is a computer aided detection ("CADe") software to aid in the detection and segmentation of caries in periapical radiographs. It is designed to aid dental health professionals to re
intended_use_full: Second Opinion® CS is a computer aided detection ("CADe") software to aid in the detection and segmentation of caries in periapical radiographs. It is designed to aid dental health professionals to review periapical radiographs of permanent teeth in patients 12 years of age or older as a second reader.
ground_truth: Ground Truth determined by four experienced dentists achieving consensus (Jaccard index ≥0.4) for MRMC study; detailed Ground Truth method not specified for standalone study
other_metrics: Lesion-level sensitivity for enamel: 0.95 (95% CI: 0.92, 0.97); lesion-level sensitivity for dentin: 0.86 (95% CI: 0.81, 0.90); false positives per image (FPPI) for enamel: 0.76 (95% CI: 0.70, 0.83); FPPI for dentin: 0.48 (95% CI: 0.43, 0.52); MRMC wAFROC-FOM difference (aided vs. unaided): 0.05 (95% CI: 0.01–0.09); MRMC lesion-level sensitivity increase: 0.20 (95% CI: 0.16–0.24)
